_meta.title: OSPF Router Hostnames - IP to Name Mapping on Graph
_meta.description: Set router hostnames for saved OSPF graphs, optionally use Docker DNS, migrate names between uploads, and update graph labels.
_meta.og_description: Map OSPF router IDs to hostnames on the topology, sync from CSV or NetBox, and migrate names between saved graphs.
_meta.meta_keywords: topolograph, OSPF, hostname, DNS, router ID, graph labels, NetBox

intro_footer: The Docker version of the site has a DNS server as an option (specify the DNS IP in docker-compose.override.yml). However, not all OSPF RIDs may be registered in DNS, so there is an option here to replace the IP node label on the graph with its hostname.
migrate_footer: Set hostnames once, then get a fresh copy of the OSPF topology and copy/migrate the network node hostnames from the graph where they are configured to the latest uploaded graph.
